summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience designing, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems at scale. Built and deployed ML infrastructure spanning data pipelines, model training, FastAPI inference services, and Kubernetes orchestration across computer vision, NLP, and LLM applications. Experienced writing clean, optimized Python code, participating in code reviews, and supporting system testing and debugging in collaborative engineering environments on AWS and GCP.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Model Deployment, Prompt Engineering, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, Data Pipelines, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
